parameters.content:
## Workflow 5 – Payroll Processing

**Trigger:** Daily at 02:00 UTC (change cron to `0 2 * * 0` for weekly on Sundays)

**What it does:**
1. Reads CleanersProfile, Properties, CleaningJobs, PayrollRecords
2. Filters to COMPLETED jobs with no payroll yet
3. Per job: calculates hours, validates cleaner rate, checks for duplicates
4. Writes PayrollRecord, updates CleaningJob + Reservation to READY
5. Sends one admin summary email after all jobs are processed

**ONE-TIME SETUP (before first run):**
- Add `payrollStatus` header to CleaningJobs tab as column AF (col 32)
- Add `hourlyRate` values in CleanersProfile tab col H for each cleaner
- Replace `admin@example.com` in the Send Summary Email node

**Design rules:**
- Only processes COMPLETED jobs (status check is strict)
- Snapshots hourlyRate at calculation time
- Duplicate protection via PayrollRecords bookingUid check
- Errors logged to PayrollErrors tab — do NOT stop the batch
- No payments: records READY/UNPAID only

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Daily at 02:00 UTC. Change cron to '0 2 * * 0' for weekly (Sundays only).

nodes.name: Read CleanersProfile
nodes.notes: Reads all cleaners. Used: cleanerId, name, email, hourlyRate (col H).

parameters.jsCode:
// Reduce to one item so Read Properties runs once (not once per cleaner row).
return [{ json: {} }];

nodes.name: Pass Single Item 1
nodes.notes: Prevents fanout. CleanersProfile data remains accessible via $('Read CleanersProfile').all().

nodes.name: Read Properties
nodes.notes: Reads all properties. Used: propertyUid, propertyName.

nodes.name: Read CleaningJobs
nodes.notes: Reads all cleaning jobs. Filter Eligible Jobs narrows to COMPLETED + unpaid.

nodes.name: Read All PayrollRecords
nodes.notes: Snapshot of existing payroll records loaded once at startup. Used by Check Duplicate inside the loop.

nodes.name: Filter Eligible Jobs
nodes.notes: Returns eligible jobs by reading $('Read CleaningJobs').all() — not $input — so the Pass Single Item chain does not affect availability.

nodes.name: IF: Any Eligible Jobs?
nodes.notes: True: jobs found -> continue. False: nothing to do -> workflow ends cleanly (no email sent).

nodes.name: Initialize Summary
nodes.notes: Clears any stale staticData from previous runs, passes eligible jobs through to SiB.

nodes.name: Split In Batches
nodes.notes: Batch size 1. Output 0 = done (-> Compile Summary Email). Output 1 = loop (-> Calculate Worked Hours).

nodes.name: Calculate Worked Hours
nodes.notes: Parses UTC timestamps, computes decimal hours (e.g. 2h45m = 2.75). Sanity checks: negative, zero, or >12h.

nodes.name: IF: Sanity Error?
nodes.notes: True -> log error, update job status, loop back. False -> continue to cleaner lookup.

nodes.name: Append PayrollErrors: Sanity
nodes.notes: Runs BEFORE the job status update so _errorMessage is still in $json.

nodes.name: Update Job: Sanity ERROR
nodes.notes: Sets payrollStatus=ERROR on CleaningJobs row so it won't be retried. $json.bookingUid comes from the PayrollErrors append output.

nodes.name: Accumulate Error: Sanity
nodes.notes: Pushes error into staticData summary, then loops back to SiB.

nodes.name: Lookup Cleaner Details
nodes.notes: Finds cleaner by cleanerId in pre-loaded CleanersProfile. Errors if not found or hourlyRate missing/zero.

nodes.name: IF: Cleaner Rate Error?
nodes.notes: True -> log error, update job, loop back. False -> continue to property lookup.

nodes.name: Append PayrollErrors: Rate
nodes.notes: Logs missing-rate error while _errorMessage is still in $json.

nodes.name: Lookup Property Details
nodes.notes: Finds propertyName from pre-loaded Properties. Falls back to propertyUid (non-fatal).

nodes.name: Calculate Gross Pay
nodes.notes: grossPay = workedHours x hourlyRate, rounded to 2 decimal places.

nodes.name: Check Duplicate
nodes.notes: Checks snapshot of PayrollRecords loaded at startup. Prevents double-write if workflow reruns within the same day.

nodes.name: IF: Duplicate?
nodes.notes: True -> skip (already processed). False -> write PayrollRecord.

nodes.name: Skip: Already Processed
nodes.notes: No-op. Loops back to SiB for the next job.

nodes.name: Append PayrollRecord
nodes.notes: Writes one row to PayrollRecords. hourlyRate is snapshotted here — historical records are unaffected by future rate changes.

nodes.name: Update CleaningJob: READY
nodes.notes: Writes workedHours + payrollStatus=READY to CleaningJobs. Requires payrollStatus column in CleaningJobs tab (add as col AF).

nodes.name: Update Reservation: READY
nodes.notes: Marks Reservations payrollStatus=READY. Column already exists in Reservations tab.

nodes.name: Accumulate Success
nodes.notes: References $('Calculate Gross Pay').last() for clean job data before downstream GSheets nodes overwrote $json.

nodes.name: Compile Summary Email
nodes.notes: Fires on SiB output 0 (done). Reads accumulated staticData, builds HTML email, clears staticData.

nodes.name: Send Summary Email
nodes.notes: REPLACE admin@example.com before activating. Sends one email per run (not per job). Not sent if zero eligible jobs found.
